entry.title: Re: Sap.Data.SQLAnywhere.SAException (0x80004005): Proced...

entry.title: Re: Streamlining direct material sourcing from Design to Contract- Secure collaboration

Ashish Shah

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps now returns attributes with process instances

I was able to test it and it works as advertised. The documentation, as usual, doesn;t explain how to approve/reject using the API. 

I also found this post that shows exactly how to do it.

entry.title: Re: Sell from Project Stock in Public cloud system.
entry.content:
Hi @manish_sati1,

Could you please confirm if you're executing the scope item 6GD?

I would recommend following the test script (item categories) and reviewing that the MRP 3 view of the material master contains the strategy group E2.

For more detailed information: Engineer to Order: Sales from Project Stock Without Planning (E2) Strategy

Hope this helps.

Arturo

entry.title: Re: V51vp - item was not found - process cancelled during goods issue
entry.content: As I said, there are SAP notes. What about them?

entry.title: SAC - show number of orders for Top 10 revenue customers
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I got a chart Top 10 customers by revenue.

Can I apply this customer ranking to another chart (as filter) somehow? E.g. a chart showing number of orders for the top 10 revenue customers?

When I look at the ranking options auf the number of orders chart I see only the measures included in this chart but not "other" measures of the underlying model. 

Thanks in advance for all replies!

Best regards
Axel

PS: I am using a BW Live model if it matters ... and yes I could build in BW a pre-query filter variable etc. but I was wondering if SAC could handle it somehow as for me it is a common requirement (if I would be biz and not IT)

entry.title: Re: GRDC Run Data Mapping, Import status error
entry.content: Did you find a resolution for this?

entry.title: Onboarding 2.0 - Second Rehire check using an external application
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Our Onboarding Variant Process is as follows: Review new hire data (standard task) > Data Collection (External custom task) > MPH (standard task) > EC.

We use an external application where the onboarding candidate uploads all their documents and personal information.
 
We are encountering a problem in cases of re-hiring. When we reach the step of collecting documents and personal data, our application sends this information to Manage Pending Hire. However, the SFSF returns an error indicating that the National ID already exists. This is expected because we are dealing with a rehire situation.
 
But, in the standard ONB solution, the second rehire verification check is triggered at the end of the Personal Data Collection task. This task has been removed from our Variant Process to incorporate our external application.
 
The question I have is: since we know the standard process triggers the second rehire check, how can we make our external application trigger the second rehire check as well?
 
Here are some relevant observations:
 
- The process begins in the RCM.
- The first rehire check is not triggered because the client does not collect the National ID during the RCM process.
- The candidate always arrives in ONB as a "new hire." If they arrived as a "rehire," we would not face any issues with our external application.

entry.title: Mass deletion of archived attachments on OpenText archive sever.
entry.content: Our SAP environment (7.50) utilizes OpenText software via archive link to store attachments for various business requirements.  To date we have amassed a large volume of attachments resulting in an increase of storage area.  In an attempt to avoid continually adding disc space to the OpenText database has anyone employed or know of a mass deletion scheme using parameters such as date ranges to address their growing volume of attachments.  There doesn’t appear to be any transaction in SAP which allows for this.

entry.title: Attach document to Signavio
entry.content: I'm trying to figure out a way to attach a document or link to a document to a signavio workflow.  any suggestions are appreciated!

entry.title: Ariba LineItemsPOCloseImport encounters ERR_FR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS after migrating to async-xsjs
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we are always encountering error ERR_FR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS when requesting to 
SAP Ariba LineItemsPOCloseImport api (https://s1.ariba.com/Buyer/soap/consulting-T/LineItemsPOCloseImport),
This feature is working before without the NodeJS upgrade and migration to async-xsjs even though the credentials are correct, we also try to misconfigure the credential for the authorization but this still returns the same error.

Please see the code below for your reference:

var dest = await $.net.http.readDestination("EXTERNAL_HTTP");
var client = new $.net.http.Client();
var req = new $.web.WebRequest($.net.http.POST, "");
req.headers.set("Content-Type", "application/soap+xml");
req.headers.set("Authorization", "Basic " + dest.username + ":" + dest.password);
req.setBody(soapenv);
await client.request(req, dest.host);
var response = await client.getResponse(); // -> this returns error after acquiring the response.

evidence of the error:

entry.title: Re: LMS SF User Connector filter by Department
entry.content:
If you don't want to user the IC export job (which I would recommend to use), but the old provisioning job, you can limit the job owner of that export job via the RBPs to just have permission to access the users from that department and therefore only these would be in the export.

But again, strongly recommend to use the IC export job, which still involves the user connector anyways, it is just another way how the actual export file is created, but you have a lot more flexibility in adding/ filtering users and structure the data.

entry.title: Re: Saiba mais sobre as contingências existentes na solução de Nota Fiscal Eletrônica no ERP
entry.content:
Olá @claudia_wada , tudo bem?

Identifiquei que existe uma pequena falha no código de Cancel Prior to Authorization, que provoca DUMP. Veja abaixo:

Program: J_1BNFE_MONITOR_F35
Form: CANCEL_PRIOR_AUTH
Line: 116

A variável "SUBRC" é do tipo caracter. Mas na linha 116 há uma comparação com tipo numérico. Note que na linha 95 é atribuído 'X' à varíável.

Estou em um cliente na versão 618 SP 08.
Saberia informar se já existe nota de correção para isso e qual seria?
Agradeço desde já.

entry.title: Re: SAP SQL Anywhere RESTORE with RENAME - What is the co...
entry.content:
Some things to consider

  • you might not want to RESTORE a database on the same server as the source database is currently running.  This could result in a naming conflict. 
  • if you are running a network server, you have to ensure that you have given permissions to start a database with the -gd switch.  I would suggest RESTORE on a personal server to avoid that requirement. 

I would likely use, where ENG is a unique server name on the machine running the restore. This will autostart the personal server.

dbisql -nogui -c "UID=dba;PWD=password;ENG=MyBURestore;DBN=utility_db" /restore_files/restore.sql

entry.title: Dive into the Human Capital Management Showcase - Register now for the live session!
entry.content:
Join the inspiring journey of our real-life customer, as they transform their workforce into a dynamic, future-ready team. In this compelling showcase, explore how SAP SuccessFactors (including the latest SAP Business AI use cases) drives organizations to:

  • Build a skills-based organization by identifying and bridging skill gaps
  • Unlock employee potential by aligning career paths with tailored growth opportunities and mentoring
  • Attract and hire top talent with optimized recruiting, screening, and onboarding processes
  • Manage with confidence and provide valuable feedback, recognize achievements, and prepare appropriate compensation

Learning objectives
After participating in this live session, you will:

  • understand the SAP SuccessFactors portfolio and how it empowers individuals to drive business success. 
  • understand the latest SAP Business AI use cases integrated within SAP SuccessFactors to enhance workforce efficiency and innovation. 
  • engage with a real-life customer example through a compelling storyline, showcasing practical applications and tangible business outcomes.

Live Session schedule

Dive into the Human Capital Management Showcase
Feb 18, 2025, 09:00 - 10:00 GMT+1Register
Dive into the Human Capital Management Showcase
Feb 20, 2025, 18:00 - 19:00 GMT+1Register

entry.title: Re: Copy ACTUALSQTYPRIORYEAR values are shifted by 10 weeks
Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
@DoloresCorrea 

Our landscape is DE2:200- QE2:200 and 220- VS2 (Virtual system)


Error: When trying to create the Transport  "For the tenants assigned to your project via system group, the configuration in your managed system is missing. Please consult the Setup and Administration guide for SAP Cloud ALM"


ST- PI -SP 28 

DE2:000 is the Domain controller 

Usecase selection: 

DE2:000: Transports: Create And Export 
                  Transport: Read
DE2:200: (Not selected only i can see this option Transports: Create And Export)

 QE2:000: Transports: Import

QE2:200 and 220 : (Not selected only i can see this option Transports: Create And Export)

Note: Not able to see "Manage Transport per Client"  option in any system and already 3502641 implemented

entry.title: Cannot use alternate BOM 1
entry.content:
We have two alternate BOMs and Production Versions for a semi--finished material. When we select the first production version, it uses the second Production Version/BOM. When we select the second production version it also uses the second Production Version/BOM. 

Other odd things, the second BOM does not allow for entry of the Valid From date. When we add a component, it automatically fills in the current date and does not allow it to be changed. 

Things I have checked:

  • Both BOMs are active
  • No deletion flags are set
  • The production versions are linked to the correct alternate BOMs

System: Public Cloud

Any ideas what I am doing wrong?

What else can I investigate or what steps can I take to resolve the issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP SQL Anywhere RESTORE with RENAME - What is the co...
entry.content:
Hello, Chris!
Thanks for your answer!
Let me comment your considerations.

Consideration #1. 
That's why I use different naming conventions. I can share my experience that I managed to restore database on similar server while running another database, the only difference was in successful case - there was only one database file. And there is business requirement to implement my use-case, I mean not to stop running database server.
Consideration #2.
It is the same machine. So the requirement is restoring with such set up
Feel free to provide reasons why "a_restore" error message can appear

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: GRDC Run Data Mapping, Import status error

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP Web API - Modify response body
entry.content:
Hi,

This did not work for us as well using RAP Web API. Not sure if this works in public cloud systems or BTP ABAP env. On on-premise/private cloud it does not.

.../sap/opu/odata4/sap/zfi_api_invoiceapi_o4/srvd_a2x/sap/zfi_api_invoiceapi_o4/0001/InvoiceAPI?sap-client=200&$select=InvUUID

"message": "The requested URI allows the system query options: '$expand,$format'"
 
So $select does not work. @vhardzeyenka: How did you create your service? Is it a RAP-based service or SEGW?

entry.title: Re: Send mail notification if PO output fail
entry.content:
Hi,

With Situation handling functionality, the system does trigger an email notification to Outlook with "subject - New notification on SAP Fiori Launchpad" with information about a new notification on the SAP Fiori Launchpad about "Output item Processing with Errors". Please find below the content of the email.

In the To-do section in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you will find information about errors that occurred in output processing. When you click on it, it takes you to the "Manage Output Items" app where you can see the error log.

 

 

Thanks

Regards

Jai Srinivasan

I am facing with the following error message: 

I try create a production process where the production connector is part of. The process itself runs well in the demo mode, in the productions process designer. If I run it in the final process it didn't work. So I try to activate the monitoring for the configure production connectivity app, to get more details, why it is not running in a proper way: 

and after activating the monitoring, I end up with shown error in the first picture.
Does anybody have an idea how to fix this? 

Thank you all. 

Best Regards,
Michael

entry.title: Re: Attach document to Signavio
entry.content:
You can attach documents a case to share with the case’s participants. For example, you can upload CVs for
cases in a job vacancy process. Anyone with access to the case can download the uploaded documents.
To attach a document to a case, follow these steps:
1. Open the commenting panel by choosing (comments).
2. Choose (Upload document).
3. Select the file you want to upload.
• The uploaded file is visible in the comment panel and the history panel

Or explain exacty what you are looking for?

entry.title: Re: Streamlining direct material sourcing from Design to Contract- Secure collaboration
entry.content: Ashish, Thanks for your comments. SAP Quotation management (QTM) is the supplier facing application. This application has standard integration option with SAP Business network (BN). Suppliers using BN can view the published sourcing project in BN and seamlessly navigate to QTM to create and submit the quotation.

Rgds,

Mario Ecker

entry.title: Formatting Output SQL DBA Cockpit
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there a way to format the values of the output in the DBA Cockpit? E.g. with FORMAT => FORMAT(@d, ‘dd/MM/yyyy’, ‘en-US’) AS ‘Date’,

Or how can I, for example, remove certain characters from the output?

Unfortunately I could not find any instructions for this and most of the commands do not work and throw errors.

 

Thanks, 

Sven

entry.title: Re: Copy ACTUALSQTYPRIORYEAR values are shifted by 10 weeks
entry.content:
Hallo Roberto,

thanks for providing the additional information. Looks like we are getting closer to the root cause for the issue.

I see from your new screenshots that you are indeed using a customized time profile where the technical week on level 2 is called "fiscal week". This as such shouldn't be an issue. However I now wonder how these time periods have been generated in your case? The standard approach for the technical week is that you have two buckets for a week that is shared between two months. You can see this from the screenshot that I posted yesterday (where I did a drill-down to this technical week level). With this approach you get 62 buckets in a typical year (normally you have one extra bucket for each of the twelve months, except for cases where the month ends on a Sunday and so there is no split).

Can you confirm that in your case the "fiscal week" was loaded without considering this split? Then you would have indeed only 52 buckets on your PERIOD5 level. This would explain the behavior of the system, as when you use your "fiscal week" in the copy operator, the system is expecting 62 buckets (as you already showed from the calculations in ACTUALSQTYPRIORYEAR).

If this assumption is correct, this would also mean that you had selected "calendar week" in your very first screenshot where you showed the data from your planning view. Is this correct? So there the key figure ACTUALSQTYPRIORYEAR was calculated in real-time on PERIOD4 level with using 52 buckets and you got the result you were expecting. You may try to regenerate this using a drill-down on your fiscal week and should see the difference.

Indeed a solution in your case then could be to do the copy to ZSTOREDACTUALSQTYPRIORYEAR using the calendar week as copy level.

best regards
Bernd

entry.title: Re: Error WARN in Item Connector
entry.content: @PTecnico, about the "connector.input.file.name.tenant.suffix.override" setting, it should only contain the suffix value. For example, the file name is "item_data_abc" > "connector.input.file.name.tenant.suffix.override=abc". Check if the "connector.input.file.format.csv.enable" setting exists in the "CONNECTORS" configuration and if it's "true". If yes, take a look at the KBA 2304614. Make sure that the SFTP user used to place the file in the SFTP path is the same one set in the "connector.ftp.userID" "CONNECTORS" configuration line.

entry.title: Re: #COE#BUMA Additional Field in Purchase Order Items by...
entry.content:
Hi John,

What have you tried so far in the system?

In the Custom Fields app we have the context for Purchasing Document Item:

Business Context: Procurement: Purchasing Document Item (MM_PURDOC_ITEM)

I would try to add a field here and enable it for the object models.

Generally, if you want to find out about the extensibility options, you would start in the Fiori App Library.

For example, the entry for this app: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/index.html#/detail/Apps('F2420')/S34

In the Implementation Tab, there is a section on Extensibility, in this case, it looks like your answer is "no":

There will also be a link there to the App Documentation (see the "Read more in App Documentation").

In this case, it will take you to this help app: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/40703658009e0946e10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US

At that help link there will usually be a section about the supported extensibility options. If you scroll down a little from that Help topic this one is listed: Adapt and Extend Functionality of Apps (Extensibility)

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/b5e2dbebafdc4cd7807e06e0a5e66347.html?locale=en-US

If none is listed there, I would recommend to try the object model approach. If that does not work, it is likely the app doesn't support the custom field extensibility.

In this case, you could consider a Custom CDS view that could link to the two objects and use a report/ analytical app.

I checked in my system and none of the custom fields we have defined show up in that app, so I am inclined to agree with the Fiori App Library. The default Adapt Filters option does have Item and Material, but doesn't appear that Supplier Material is specifically available.

 

I hope this helps

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Automatic Form Launch based on 'n' days plus hire date
entry.content:
Hello,

Really good article and solution, thanks for this.

We want to use this to launch the form on the hire date. It works really well, but when a change is made on the hire record afterwards, the form launches again. Is there any way to prevent this? I can't use rule contexts for a postsave rule to prevent the rule from triggering at a UI change. It would be great if the system could recognize that there is already a form in place for the user and not launch the form again.

entry.title: Re: Does SAC have a Rank function?
entry.content:
Hi MadhuLodugu,

You can achieve this by creating dummy measure in model Here below shows sample.

I have 2 measure Profit and Sale

Then I create 2 Rank column for Rank_Profit and Rank_Sale 

Then Sum of Rank

You can give rank as per your choice then addition of this rank measures in last column As shown below

Thanks.

entry.title: Assortment module in value sales contract in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is it possible to use assortment module for value sales contract in public cloud?

We could not find anything specifically for public cloud.

If yes, please also share the steps to to configure to determined in value contract.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to auto generate ID column on CAP Entity Projects?
entry.content:
As part of our project requirement we want to use generated number with prefix of 'S' and few leading zeros '0000' and number in the end like 1 etc. The expected generated value is like below where there is any insert in to:

entity BPM : cuid, managed {
     publish_status     : String(500);
     retry_count : Integer default 0;
     internalId: String(10); // generated string
}
 
generated string should be like
S000000001
S000000002
S000000003
S000000004
S000000005
....
S000000015 etc.
 
 
If this is not possible at least generated integer and auto increment on insert like below:
entity BPM : cuid, managed {
     publish_status     : String(500);
     retry_count : Integer default 0;
     internalId: Integer auto generated increment by 1 // generated number...
}
 
We have already UUID generated value, but still we are looking the internal ID in readable format like 10 character string. I got some example with sequence, but we want to avoid call to sequence and set the text before insert. please help if any one is aware of that.

entry.title: Re: V51vp - item was not found - process cancelled during...
entry.content:
So lips-pckpf 'Packing Control'

  • ' ' = 'Can be packed'
  • 'A' = 'Must be packed'
  • 'B' = 'Cannot be packed'

Check also lips-chhpv 'Pack acc. batch'

  • Flag off = pack on batch split level
  • Flag on  = pack on main item level

You should check Customizing wih 0VLP - Logistics General-Handling Unit Management-Basics-Delivery-Packing Control by Item Category 

  • compare table TVLP between both systems

entry.title: Hyperlink from SAC Story to VA02 Transaction in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to jump from SAC Report to a specific Sales Order Change (VA02) transaction so users can make changes to a specific sales order the report is identifying and passing the specific sales order as a parameter to the transaction. VA02 uses Order: as a Parameter to this transaction and not sure what is being used(technical object underneath).

The sales Order is called as SO in my SAC Table/Report and I used the hyperlink option on the Sales Order Field and it takes me to S4 transaction but does not pass the Sales Order and execute the transaction. But the same works fomr another transaction/fiori tile SalesOrder-displayFactSheet.

So my questions are

1. Is it possible to hyperlink to VA02? The following is the hyperlink does not work. 

I create using the Sales Order SO as a paramter passing from SAC

https://server.client.com/sap/bc/ui2/flp?sap-client=130&sap-language=EN#SalesDocument-change?Order=SO

If the way I pass or teh link is wrong, please provide the syntax...

2. The following link works for another transaction (but it is a Fiori Tile SalesOrder-displayFactSheet)

https://server.client.com/sap/bc/ui2/flp?sap-client=130&sap-language=EN#SalesOrder-displayFactSheet?SalesOrder=SO

Thank you,

Arthur.

entry.title: Re: Go for your quick win! Migrate Identity Provisioning tenants to SAP Cloud Identity infrastructur
entry.content:
Hi,

1. Migrating an IPS tenant to SCI infrastructure does not affect the existing IAS tenant setup. This process only enables the IPS tenant and migrates the provisioning systems.

2. Filtering SFSF users is described in https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/list-of-properties -> sf.user.filter

3. The biggest time determinant for how long this process will take is the number of systems and provisioned entities the customer wants to migrate. The more systems and provisioned entities involved, the longer the migration process will take.

entry.title: Re: API calls count not matching with IFLOW messages in Intergration suite
entry.content:
Hi @prasanthi_chavala 

Are you located in a country/region that uses UTC-0 as a local time?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: RAP Action: The command "COMMIT-ENTITIES" is not allo...

entry.title: OTC contract agreement Fiori App ID
entry.content:
Hi Folks

I am unable to find the "Chargeback agreement" and "Change Display Agreement" (see attached image) in Fiori App.  I am looking for names of the Odata Service/CDS views behind the apps for reporting purpose.

Especially the data source related to the Benefits tab as shown below.  Please guide me.

entry.title: Re: Requirement of 4 savings plan and employer contribution cap
entry.content:
Thanks SimarK for your comment. I can give you an example:

There is an employee A who has the options of choosing from 4 different plans - RRSP, TFSA, Plan X, Plan Y. Employer will match double of the employee contribution to a max of 10%.

Employee A goes to the RRSP plan, enters  3% employee contribution,  6% of employer contribution and saves the plan.
Then he goes to TFSA plan and specifies employee contribution % to 3% and specifies employer contribution % again to 6%. While saving the TFSA plan contributions,  system should know that employee had selected 6% RRSP employer contribution  and now 6% TFSA contribution will make employer contributions ( RRSP 6% + TFSA 6%) above the employer 10% max cap and the system should throw an error that employer % exceeds the 10% limit.

If employee changes employer contribution % on TFSA to 4% then employer contributions ( RRSP 6% + TFSA 4 %) follow employer 10% max cap and employee should be able to save the TFSA contribution.

So basically while saving each plan the system should know the employer contributions in the other 3 plans and ensure that they do not exceed the employer 10% cap.

Hope this clarificaiton helps. Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: Thresholds Prevent Unintended Deletion of Users when Provisioning with SAP Cloud Identity Servic
entry.content:
Hi,

Scheduling will continue uninterrupted, and users will not be deleted in batches of 5 every 15 minutes. If the threshold is exceeded, IPS will report "0" deleted entities and provide the count of entities that exceeded the threshold. In general, when the threshold is exceeded, no entities will be deleted. If the threshold is not exceeded, IPS will delete the entities below the threshold.

Best regards,

Ivelina

entry.title: Re: Is link alias not available for interaction segmentat...
entry.content:
Hi Joyca,

Yes, this is correct: unfortunately, there is no attribute in interaction-based segmentation (i.e. segmentation object SAP_CE_INTERACTIONS) that corresponds to "Text of Launch URL" in contact- or consumer-based segmentation.

Best regards,
Christof
SAP Marketing Cloud

entry.title: How to get ClientIP in Sap commerce cloud Backend.
entry.content:
How to capture the client api from Sap commerce Cloud Backend api.

Currenly i am using the below code

In this getHeader("X-FORWARDED-FOR") is giving null and  using the getRemoteAddr api sometimes we are getting correct details.Is there any way we can capture it properly

String forwardedClientIp = servletRequest.getHeader("X-FORWARDED-FOR");
String clientIp = StringUtils.isNotEmpty(forwardedClientIp) ? forwardedClientIp : servletRequest.getRemoteAddr();

entry.title: Migrate from webagent to mod auth oidc if reverse proxy with apache
entry.content:
SAP BO application integrate with reverse proxy with apache between corporate on-premises IDP.

Currently integrated with webagent SAML authentication and require to migrate from webagent to mod auth oidc 

Mod auth OIDC changes are completed in external apache reverse proxy server and apache is expecting to allow the resource by sap bo application.

getting the below error message 

Service Unavailable

The server is temporarily unable to service your request due to maintenance downtime or capacity problems. Please try again later.

Additionally, a 503 Service Unavailable error was encountered while trying to use an ErrorDocument to handle the request.

Can you please help me to find out the configuration required in SAP BO to understand the token exchanged by apache and allowed user to access the application.

entry.title: Re: CCM - Statistical price condition in delta accruals
entry.content:
Dear Umasaral,

It seems you haven’t fully grasped the process we are involved in. We are working on the new CCM for sale (the note does not pertain to this topic, the user exit is not triggered during the creation of the settlement document).

Additionally, we are looking for a standard feature to ensure something was manageable by the SD rebate agreement. Based on this, when reviewing the customization of settlement document 0S42, I can see a set of variables that we can apply, but we may not be combining them correctly. Even when activating the statistical flag on RED1 (either in the price condition or in the related pricing schema), we cannot determine both account keys relevant for posting: only the G/L account key is being triggered. In addition, I can conclude that we cannot use the parameter to post accrual only (RED1 cannot appear as accrual in the pricing schema for delta accruals).

Thanks again,

Michele

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 v1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
@luize_boyen @lipe_flores

Bom dia!

Quem fará migração ao Rise necessita aplicar as Notas NFe entrada??

Obrigada

entry.title: List price is not updated in the Service Order that was a follow up from the Contract.
entry.content:
The list price not auto populating to service order created as a follow-up from contract.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: List price is not updated in the Service Order that w...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Service order is just a planning document for a contract in this scenario and no price gets determined for such items. In the service order you needs to plan the fulfillment and working condition of the service/spare part. such items are invoiced on contract only.

In service confirmations created from service order items, price will be picked up from contract, if price agreements in contract is maintained.

You can refer to the "KBA 2631614 - List Price Maintained in the Contract is not Fetching into the Follow-up Service Order" for more details. 

Thanks & Regards, 

Arjun T H 

SAP Product Support

entry.title: Assignment Profile Behaviour with Items, Library, Curricula
entry.content:
Hi Ive been looking for a clear description of Assignment Profiles in relation to how they treat the item, library, curricula and/or programme they are linked to. When does the content linked to an assignment profile show up in the search results when a user is browsing for courses VS when does it get assigned to them 

If its assigned to them WHERE does it appear?  They only time my testing shows consistent results is when i have a REQUIRED item linked to the Assignment Profile - then i see it as a Required item in my learning plan on the home page.  Other than that, I dont understand what settings affect which result. Ive spent ages looking for the right guidance. I understand the AP and how to set it up however not when / how items / curricula / programmes are Assigned VS just visible in search

Thanks

entry.title: Re: DIALOG TO CALL OOALV TWICE AND OOALV SHOW WRONG DATA
entry.content:
You create a new docking container every time (CREATE OBJECT go_docking_two_part).

You should create it only in case it isn't bound yet.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite – Connect Everything FEATURING SALESFORCE
entry.content:
As businesses continue to adopt a wide range of technologies to drive innovation and efficiency, the need for seamless integration across diverse systems has never been more critical. While SAP is often seen as a leader in ERP solutions, many still believe its integration capabilities are limited to SAP-centric environments. However, the SAP Integration Suite is designed to challenge this notion. It’s a flexible, cloud-based platform that not only connects SAP systems but also bridges the gap between SAP and a wide array of non-SAP applications, legacy systems, and modern cloud solutions.  

This blog is the second part in a series dedicated to exploring how SAP Integration Suite is enabling organizations to integrate everything - from third-party tools to cutting-edge cloud platforms - into a unified, connected ecosystem. I will demonstrate step by step how easy it is to set up an integration scenario with Salesforce start to finish. You can also leverage this blog as a general approach on how to set up integration scenarios with 3rd party systems and applications.

 

THE USE CASE  

Salesforce has become the cornerstone of customer relationship management (CRM) for businesses worldwide, providing powerful tools to manage sales, service, and marketing. The integration between an ERP system such as SAP S/4HANA Cloud and Salesforce, facilitated through the Cloud Integration capability of the SAP Integration Suite, synchronizes master data like products, customers, and pricing. With real-time synchronization of this data business workflows and operational efficiency across teams can be improved, raising an organization’s ability to deliver exceptional customer experiences while optimizing internal processes.  

How does it work? Data is retrieved from SAP S/4HANA, transformed into Salesforce-compatible formats (SObjects), and sent to Salesforce via the Salesforce Adapter. And of course it can also go the other way: data from Salesforce is pulled, transformed in Cloud Integration, and then sent back to SAP S/4HANA Cloud. One such prominent use case is replicating customers (Business Partners) from S/4HANA Cloud to Salesforce (Accounts). This is what we will focus on now. 

 

HOW TO DO IT 

Before starting to develop any integration scenario in SAP Integration Suite it is advisable to check out what is already available in SAP’s wide array of standard content including APIs, complete integration flows and detailed configuration guides. Naturally, not every scenario will fit for every customer, but it can often be used as a baseline rather than having to start from scratch, saving you time and money. Which brings us to... 

 

Step 1 | Finding out what is there 

The great thing is that you do not need to reinvent the wheel - SAP has a lot of standard integration content for Salesforce that is just waiting to be discovered. To find out what’s available, navigate to the SAP Business Accelerator Hub and filter based on the systems you are looking for. 

 

In our case the package “Replicate Account from SAP S4HANA Cloud to Salesforce” covers exactly what we want, delivering a complete integration flow with configuration guide. You can drill further into the content by clicking on the tile. 

 

This particular integration flow enables the replication of customer master data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to Salesforce as Accounts. Any time a customer is created or updated in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, the changes are replicated to Salesforce during the next scheduled run of the integration flow. You can click through each of the processing steps in the integration flow model to understand if the content suits your needs or adjustments need to be made. Now let’s go ahead and setup our source and target systems. 

 

Step 2 | Prepare S/4HANA Cloud 

If you are aware of how to configure this, skip to the next section.  

First, a Technical Communication User is used to call OData services in SAP S/4HANA Cloud from Cloud Integration. You can set this up in your system via the Fiori Launchpad in the tile “Communication Management” --> “Maintain Communication Users” --> “New”. Note that you can reuse this for other scenarios if you wish to do so. 

 

 

Enter a username, password and description. 

 

Next, let’s create the Communication System in preparation for the Communication Arrangement. Navigate back to “Communication Management” --> “Communication Systems”. Choose “New” and provide a name.  

 

Enter the Cloud Integration runtime URL in the host field, and a name for Logical System and Business System. Move to the Inbound Communication User section to add the user you created earlier. Save your configuration. 

 

Lastly, create a Communication Arrangement via “Communication Management” --> “Communication Arrangements”. Search for “SAP_COM_0008” and click “New”. Add the Communication System you just created and check the inbound user section is filled in. Deactivate the outbound services, then “Save”. 

 

Step 3 | Prepare Salesforce 

Follow the instruction here to set up your Salesforce system. 

 

Step 4 | Configure Cloud Integration 

Create the Credentials for Salesforce and S/4HANA Cloud in your Cloud Integration tenant and deploy. Then pull the standard content via the “Discover” section. Search for the content you want to pull and click on “Copy”. Then move to the “Design” section and find the copied iFlow. Click “Configure” and enter all the information. 

Then deploy and you’re done! Yes, that was quick. 

 

You can see how easy it is to set up an integration scenario with the SAP Integration Suite. It is particularly valuable if complete iFlows are available that fulfill your needs or can be extended to suit your wishes. But it is in no way a prerequisite to working with 3rd party systems. If you want to build custom content, you can leverage other resources such as standard adapters and APIs in the API Business Accelerator Hub and make use of the inherent flexibility of SAP’s Integration Suite.  

I’d be interested to hear your thoughts and experiences concerning Salesforce integrations with the SAP Integration Suite. What challenges are you encountering in your integration process? What is working well? Please feel free to leave a comment or reach out with any questions. And be sure to check out other blogs within this series – there is more interesting content to come throughout the entire year.

entry.title: Re: How to use BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS to mass upload price conditions
entry.content:
I recently had situation:

  • did VK11 automatism via batch input (like mentioned above)
  • was working fine for years
  • recently due to access sequence enhancement (which is typical enhancement work with customizing) the batch input crashed of course 
  • and due to design of this old BI-FM we were NOT aware of this new dysfunction for a few weeks!

So as always: there's no easy answer, which solution is best - because of the batch-input problem I created version 2 of function with BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS

(not yet done finally, but guess like in the last decades I'll solve also these remaining small problems)

entry.title: Introduction
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

 

My name is Esther, and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I have a background in customer service and IT support. I am also currently getting a bachelor’s degree in Cybersecurity. I have a strong interest in SAP solutions. My career journey has led me to explore SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and I’m eager to deepen my knowledge in SAP.

 

I’m currently working towards my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group, and I’m really looking forward to expanding my knowledge in SAP CRM and customer management, Success factor, supply chain management, finance and cloud technology.

 

I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because of career advancement, interest in ERP systems, transition into SAP consulting, and cloud technology. I believe this learning journey will open doors to new opportunities and help me contribute effectively to SAP-related projects.

 

I’m also open to connecting with others who are interested in SAP solutions, business transformation and processes, and cloud technology. Networking with like-minded professionals will be a great way to exchange knowledge and grow together in this field.

Looking forward to engaging, learning, and collaborating with all of you!

 

 

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

 

Best regards,  

Esther Oderinde

entry.title: Re: Issue with CS_SEC_EXTENDED_ENCRYPTION to CS_TRUE
entry.content: it was having the issue irrespective of what the target ASE was having ,so both yes enable or disable it was giving that error

entry.title: Re: Debugging steps of sales order credit exposure update analysis from SD perspective
entry.content: Thanks for sharing such a detailed blog. Appreciate your efforts !!!

entry.title: Re: Enquiry on SQL Anywhere 17.0.10.6089: "SAP JRE" JRE18...
entry.content:
There are no known security vulnerabilities in the JRE that impact SQL Anywhere use. Ee do document some CVEs that scanners may report and identify the SQL Anywhere update which contains a JRE version that has the mitigation of the CVE. Scanners report vulnerabilities in JRE shipped with SQL Anywhere.

We have updated the JRE, as other 3rd party components including SAP components, a number of times in the past years. SQL Anywhere is now shipping with Java version 1.8.0 381.

There are also multiple security notes related to SQL Anywhere (Component BC-SYB-SQA) which do impact the version your are running.  I would encourage you to update to a recent release to mitigate those issues.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition & SAP Mobile St...
entry.content:
Update:

we decided on a workaround as follows:

1. On the SAP BWZ site, Language Selection: NO. By doing this we ensure that the language of the browser will be enforced.

2. on the mobile device, switch device language as needed. So for instance in iOS, settings -> general -> Language and region -> delete one language and add another. It is not enough to just switch preferred language; if both languages are allowed on the device, the site will forever show in the one in which the app was launched first. 

Our users are not really bilingual so this single device language works in our scenario.

entry.title: Standard Fields are not available in BAPI Successors I_MaterialDocumentTP
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to post GR using BO I_MATERIALDOCUMENTTP. Required to pass extension fields such as WRF_CHARSTC1 (Characteristic Value 1), WRF_CHARSTC2 (Characteristic Value 2). But, it is not available when using MODIFY ENTITIES OF I_MaterialDocumentTP and it is not extensible also. Earlier in standard BAPI , these fields  are filled under extension structures.

Any suggestions ?

RISE with SAP  MM (Materials Management) ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: How to pass current system date as parameters while pulling data from Datasphere to SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is the scenario. I'm pulling the data from SAP Datasphere into SAC story and it has "from fiscal year" and "to fiscal year" as story prompts. There is a requirement that this prompt should pick the system date instead of user manually entering the value. Is it possible via scripting?

Anyone who has faced this similar issue or knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Is there any way for a single user to execute data ac...
entry.content:
Hi, you can run data action / multi action it in background and start in a row. However, both are queued in the background and executed serially. Even if you use a second user to execute them in parallel they are again queued and executed serially. You can observe this behaviour in the data action monitor (or with QRC1.25 in the Job Monitor).
Conculsion: Data Actions can´t be parallalized.

Please upvote/accept if it helps.

BR Thomas

entry.title: Re: Data Masking in SAC

entry.title: Re: Rise in Hypersaler IBM

entry.title: Data Action calculation with data on different date granularity (months and days)
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I´ve data model on daily granularity.

  • Quantities are stored on daily level
  • Prices are stored on the first of each month
  • Goal: Calculate Amount (per day) = Quantities (per day) x Price (per corresponding month)

What´s the easiest and most performant way to achieve this?

Here is my (sample) model:

Story with sample data:

As you can see for data on Feb 10th and 23rd the price from Jan instead of Feb is taken

Here is the data action to calculate AMOUNT:

Reason for the wrong calculation is the FIRST function, which returns the first day of the year only. Not aware of a function which returns the first day of the month.
However, AMOUNT should be calculated on daily level as QUANTITY (daily level) x PRICE (monthly level).

If possible I´d like to avoid a FOREACH loop because of data volume and performance. Any ideas to achive this?

Thank you,
Thomas

entry.title: SAP B1 Message 173-17 || Meldung 173-17
entry.content:
Situation:

For testing purposes I wanted to make a manual journal entry to accounts with different currencies.

Expected result:

After checking that the account balance (debit and credit across all accounts) holds true in the default currency, I expect the system to book the journal entry.

Alternatively I expect the system to suggest other accounts on which to book a losses due to currency exchange rate.

Result:

I get the message error 173-17

I don't understand the message. Was just playing around with the functionality as I'm preparing for the Consultant exam.

entry.title: Service with Advanced Execution: Process Flow 6 – Preventive or Recurring Service Processing
entry.content:
Service with Advanced Execution is a new service business process in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. This is based on the integration of Service with Maintenance Management.

The concept of Execution Status in Service with Advanced Execution is introduced in the following blog:

Execution Status in Service with Advanced Execution

Within Service with Advanced Execution, there are various process flows depending on the business scenario. These process flows are distinguished based on two aspects:

  • How the process starts, and which is the first transaction.
  • What is the trigger for the creation of the maintenance order and eventually the start of planning.

Process Flow 6:

This blog showcases the process flow wherein the initial transaction is the service contract and the maintenance plan. On scheduling the maintenance plan, both the documents are created simultaneously i.e. service order with execution order item and billable maintenance order along with the linkage between the two.

Maintenance plans enable the scheduling of recurring services at predefined intervals. These services can be part of routine maintenance on a periodic basis or triggered based on usage or performance.

For e.g. A car dealership offers preventive maintenance services for customers who have purchased vehicles from them. As part of the service agreement, the dealership provides regular doorstep maintenance every 6 months, to ensure optimal vehicle performance and longevity. A time-based maintenance plan can be set up for the car. After every 6 months, the maintenance plan triggers the creation of two orders:

  • A Service Order (the commercial object).
  • A Maintenance Order (the execution object with task list).

The service order and the maintenance order are linked with each other through document flow.

In addition to the routine maintenance, the dealership also recommends a battery replacement every 2 years. This service can be planned with a strategy-based maintenance plan.

Creation of Service Contract

A service contract can be created using ‘Manage Service Contracts’ App.
The following details could be filled while creating a service contract:

  • Sold-to-Party
  • Organizational data such as Sales Organization
  • Price information such as price agreement
  • Parties involved
  • Item details such as billing plan, price information, object list, product list etc.

Creation of Maintenance Plan

A maintenance plan can be created using ‘Add Single Plan’, ‘Add Strategy Controlled Plan’ or ‘Add Multiple Counter Plan’ Apps to create time-based or performance-based single cycle plans, strategy plans or multiple counter maintenance plans respectively.

The following details could be filled while creating a maintenance plan:

  1. Select the maintenance plan category.
  2. On the Item tab, enter a new item by specifying item description and technical object. In the planning data section enter service contact, service contract item, and order type. Contract mandatory.
  3. Provide a name for the maintenance plan and enter the cycle details. Optionally, enter a task list.
  4. Enter the scheduling period under maintenance plan scheduling parameters tab to specify the number of days, months, or years over which scheduling will take place.
  5. The ‘Do Not Rel. Immediately’ checkbox can be marked, if the maintenance order must not be released immediately once created.

Scheduling of Maintenance Plan

Once a maintenance plan is created, the next step is to schedule it. In the ‘Schedule Maintenance Plan' App, do the following:

  1. Enter the plan number created.
  2. When Start is clicked, the scheduling list gets populated with all scheduled calls and the dates for which they have been scheduled.
  3. Once Save is clicked, depending on the call dates, the service order and its corresponding maintenance order is generated as call objects.

The service product in the service order is copied from the service contract as the execution order item. The item category for this service product is determined from the ‘Copy Item Categories - Item Category Determination’ customizing.

Similarly, the Sold-to-Party in the service order is also taken over from the service contract.

While creating the service order and the maintenance order, the order type mapping configurations (SPRO -> Service -> Transactions -> Settings for Service Transactions -> Integration -> Plant Maintenance Integration-> Map Order Types) are not relevant. The service transaction type and plant maintenance order type are user inputs in the maintenance plan.

The operations and components in the maintenance order are derived from the task list entered in the maintenance plan.

Status lifecycle in Service with Advanced Execution

                                                      Current state of an execution order item

The state diagram illustrates the status lifecycle of one execution order item along with its corresponding maintenance order in this process flow. Each block below represents a state displaying 3 different status values. The lifecycle and execution status of an execution order item along with the status of the corresponding maintenance order.

 

Release of Execution Order Item

Once the service order and execution order item details are finalized, the lifecycle status can be set to ‘Released’. When the execution order item is released and saved, the billable maintenance order is created in ‘CRTD’ (Created) status. The execution status on the execution order item is set as ‘Execution Planning’ as soon as the maintenance order is created.

Note: The execution order item can be rejected only when the execution status is ‘Execution Planning’.

The document flow between the service order and maintenance order can be viewed in Transaction History assignment block. The maintenance plan and maintenance item document flow can also be viewed here.

The details of the maintenance order connected to the execution order item can be viewed in the Maintenance Order assignment block in the item.

Release of Maintenance Order

Once the maintenance order is created from the service order, the maintenance order is in planning phase. After the planning is done, the maintenance order is set to ‘Released’ by the Maintenance Planner. Then the execution of service can be started. The maintenance order status is changed from ‘CRTD’ to ‘REL’ (Released). With this status transition, the execution status on the execution order item is set to ‘In Execution’.

Completion of Execution Order Item

After the execution of service is completed by the Maintenance Technician, the maintenance order status is set to ‘TECO’ (Technically Completed).  With this status transition, the lifecycle status of execution order item is set to ‘Completed’. The execution status on the execution order item is set to ‘Execution Done’.

Once the service order is set to ‘Completed’, the completion date is updated for the call in maintenance plan scheduling list.

Summary

The distinct feature in this process flow is the creation service order and maintenance order from maintenance plan. As we proceed with the execution of maintenance order, the lifecycle and execution status of execution order item in service order are in continuous alignment with the status of maintenance order at every step.

 

Further references

To know more about the execution order item and its attributes, please refer following blog:

Deep Dive: Execution Order Item and Billable Maintenance Order

entry.title: Re: Migration to SAP DS 4.3
entry.content: @Sharvari1 yeah, that should work. Promotion Management is only for migrating CMS repository objects like the CMC users, CMC repository List, etc. (see step 6 in my answer above). For Data Services Repository Objects you can use ATL file as shown in step 2,3,4,5 in my answer above..
